_note: Hand-written sample matching the public LoCoMo dataset schema (snap-research/locomo): conversation with speaker_a/speaker_b, session_<n>/session_<n>_date_time (each session a list of {speaker, text, dia_id} turns), and qa (list of {question, answer, category, evidence}). Facts and conversations below are invented for this repo, not copied from the real dataset. See docs/methodology.md.

session_1.speaker: Mia
session_1.text: I signed up for a pottery class starting next week.

session_2.speaker: Mia
session_2.text: Really good, I made a bowl and a small vase so far.

session_2.speaker: Mia
session_2.text: The instructor moved us to Thursdays though, scheduling conflict.

qa.question: What studio does Mia take pottery classes at?
What day of the week is Mia's pottery class now held on?
What has Mia made in her pottery class?
qa.answer: A bowl and a small vase

qa.question: What color did Mia paint her kitchen last spring?
qa.answer: The conversation never mentions Mia painting a kitchen.
